properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There’s a deep and inward hunger Within my soul. God has promised in His Word, He’ll make us whole. Well it’s time for it to happen, That huge portion of heaven; It will make and bring to pass, That tremendous victory in the love divine

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For I’m tired of tramping on this mountain, I’m heading down to the Jordan, Lo, before me I see a vision breaking, A Power that would bind that mamba, The third pull ministry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now’s my time for consecration, I must see a change in me, I will enter my secret closet, And close the door behind me. I’ll keep the feast of Unleavened Bread With truth and sincerity, For I’m expecting Jehovah-Jireh, My Lord, to meet with me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For I’m tired (I'm tired) of tramping on this mountain, (I'm heading down) I’m heading down to the Jordan, Lo, before me I see a vision breaking, A Power that would bind that mamba, The third pull ministry

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord, keep Thy Holy fire burning Deep in my soul, Change me from glory unto glory, Till Thy image You behold. Let’s keep this Holy convocation, Till we become a new creation, For it’s the message in you and me Will bring to pass that tremendous victory

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: (Lord I'm tired) Lord I’m tired of tramping on this mountain, (I’m heading down) I'm heading down to the Jordan, Lo, before me I see a vision breaking, A Power that would bind that mamba, The third pull ministry (A Power) a power that would bind that mamba, The third pull ministry (A Power that would bind) a power that would bind that mamba, The third pull ministry
